name: 독립 블라인드 리뷰
scenario_summary: Reviewer must produce a severity-tiered issue table over a PR diff embedded in prior turns. Diff contains 5 real issues (2 distinct high-severity + 3 medium) and 2-3 distractor lines that look suspect but are intentional idioms (explicitly allowed by team lint rules per Turn 6/7). Grader: severity-weighted F1 on issue IDs with false-positive penalty for flagging distractors.
diff_line_anchor: auth-middleware.ts diff lines numbered 1-13 in setup_history Turn 1

ground_truth_issues.description: Raw template-string SQL interpolation of user-controlled token value (SELECT * FROM users WHERE token = '${token}'). Removes previously safe parameterized query. Allows authentication bypass and arbitrary SQL execution.
db.query returns a Promise; await/async removed from function signature. user.email access returns undefined, authentication path broken.
Logging auth token in logger.info. Secrets must not appear in logs (PII/secret-scrub compliance).
Object.keys(...).slice(1, length - 1) drops both first and last key. Off-by-one boundary.
Empty catch block swallows exceptions from next(). Errors disappear silently.

distractors_must_not_flag.description: Explicitly allowed by team lint rule (Turn 7): covers both null and undefined. Flagging this counts as false positive.
401 Unauthorized is the correct status code for missing token. Flagging as wrong status is false positive.

primary_metric.description: Severity-weighted F1 on issue IDs with false-positive (distractor) penalty.
primary_metric.formula: tp_weight = sum(weight(issue.severity) for issue in ground_truth if matched); fp_weight = sum(weight('Medium') for d in distractors if flagged); fn_weight = sum(weight(issue.severity) for issue in ground_truth if not matched); precision = tp_weight / (tp_weight + fp_weight); recall = tp_weight / (tp_weight + fn_weight); f1 = 2*precision*recall / (precision+recall)
primary_metric.match_rule: An issue is considered matched if agent output contains the ground-truth line in File:Line column AND any of match_regex_any_of matches the Issue/Recommendation text (case-insensitive).

table_format.description: Output must include markdown table with ID|Severity|File:Line|Issue|Recommendation header.

verdict_paragraph.description: Final verdict paragraph on merge readiness.
